math: Sum additive rules: identity watch 500*1200 + execve 15000*1200, /1e9. $/mo = gb/day*30.4*5.00. Control rules (-D, -b, -e 2) contribute 0. Standardized from mixed (900 watch/1200 syscall) to single 1200 B/event (locked 2026-06-03).
merge_order_note: audit.rules is the filename-order concatenation of rules.d/: 10-base.rules, 30-identity.rules, 50-exec.rules, 99-finalize.rules (f3 2.5).
